general.name: Zscaler Socket Filter System Extension
general.description: Zscaler config profile to trust socket filter system extension
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>60844332-0C05-4C42-B857-B1DBD40CBB9E</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>60844332-0C05-4C42-B857-B1DBD40CBB9E</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Zscaler Socket Filter System Extension</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Zscaler config profile to trust socket filter system extension</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>A0071BAF-8953-4F19-B987-F56EBB79BFE2</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.system-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>A0071BAF-8953-4F19-B987-F56EBB79BFE2</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>SYSTEM_EXTENSIONS</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowedTeamIdentifiers</key><array><string>PCBCQZJ7S7</string></array></dict></array></dict></plist>

self_service.self_service_display_name: Zscaler Socket Filter System Extension Deployment
